productDisplayName: Mark Taylor Men Blue White & Dark Grey Striped Shirt
description: Composition Blue, white and dark grey striped shirt made of a blended fabric, has a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, buttoned placket, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hemline Fitting Slim Wash care Wash separately with mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Blue, white and dark grey stripes add a touch of discreet styling to this shirt from mark taylor. The spread collar, patch pocket and curved hemline accentuate the clean design. Pair it with chinos or jeans and leather slip-on shoes.
